summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Servall Hiring OS. Backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Critical frontend-backend integration issue identified due to mixed content security policy blocking HTTPS->HTTP requests.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content Error: Frontend (HTTPS) making API calls to HTTP endpoints, blocked by browser security policy
integration_issues.impact: CRITICAL - All data loading fails, no CRUD operations work in UI
affected_selectors: All pages showing 'Failed to load data' errors
integration_issues.technical_details: Frontend served over HTTPS but API redirects resolve to HTTP URLs, causing browser to block requests

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads and shows correct layout
Navigation to all pages (Branches, Jobs, Tasks, Leads Pipeline, Users, Talent Intel, Employees)
All CRUD operations via direct API calls
Auto-task creation workflow after job creation
Lead stage transitions (new_lead -> qualified -> awaiting_interview -> interview_cleared)
Pipeline stats and dashboard KPI calculations
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix mixed content security issue. The backend API redirects are resolving to HTTP URLs instead of HTTPS, causing all frontend API calls to fail. Need to ensure all API endpoints consistently use HTTPS protocol to match frontend HTTPS serving.
